MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gabriel Cano, 415-441-0408, defendant and moving party appeared in propria persona. Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq., 415-863-7100, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party C&O Realty.

Plaintiff indicted that defendant had been re-served. The Court granted the motion to quash service of summons or stay or dismiss. Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR #7855 (kh)
